Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1791 "VOLFIED-C000-1791" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Volfied.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C000 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts. 2. Copies 1024 bytes of data from $C100 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this is the state the memory was in after the depacker from the original game had finished - this allows us to skip this slow step). 3. Sets various IO registers to correct values to allow the game to start. 4. Sets the correct border and screen colours. 5. Clears the stack. 6. Re-enables raster interrupts. 7. And finally jumps to the entry point at $1791 (it couldn't use RTS because of the stack being cleared).
